name: routing_dual_intent_connect_and_winback
notes: Correct specialist routing per intent when TWO intents arrive in one message: connect a new data source (spawn_integration territory) AND win back lapsed customers (spawn_sales_recovery territory). orchestrator_agent_system.md is explicit that win-back must route to Sales-Recovery 'EVEN IF the customer data is not yet connected' and must NEVER be diverted to spawn_integration on the reasoning that data needs connecting first — this scenario checks that guidance holds even when the owner ALSO asked to connect something in the same breath. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> routing_dual_intent_connect_and_winback.json`.

steps.message: Can you connect my Google Sheets for the accounts, and separately set up a win-back campaign for customers who haven't ordered in months?
assert_not_contains: once your data is connected, we'll start the win
we can't start the win-back until
wait until your sheets are connected before we look at winning back
steps.note: Both intents in one message. Expect the reply to engage the connect ask honestly (never claim it's already connected) AND not strand the win-back ask behind the connect step — the two are independent lanes.
